message:
test(label): comprehensive unit tests for label feature (bd-3cu02.9)

Config tests (28 new cases):
- ParseSessionLabel empty input edge case
- FormatSessionName round-trip with degenerate inputs
- HasLabel/SessionBase edge cases (empty, trailing --, ---)
- ValidateLabel boundary testing (50-char limit, special chars)
- GetProjectDir label-stripping table-driven tests

CLI tests (8 new subtests):
- inferSessionFromCWD three-tier disambiguation:
  single match, labeled match, unlabeled preferred (tier 1),
  alphabetical fallback (tier 2), no match, remote skip,
  empty list, subdirectory matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
